creator: bugs.freebsd.org@cheasy.de
text:
Created attachment 147251
patch for imageindex-1.1_5 , still working for -1.1_6

As described in the ports mailing list thread
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-March/090433.html ff.,
imageindex fails with "Can't locate flush.pl in @INC ".

The patch described in
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2014-March/090449.html
(located at http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/attachments/20140303/20372415/attachment.obj , enclosed) still works with image index-1.1_6 and fixes the problem.
